# @usdctofiat/offramp v4

USDC-to-fiat offramp SDK for Base. Also ships outbound HMAC-signed webhooks for `deposit.*` and `otc.*` events (see Webhooks section below).

## Install

bun add @usdctofiat/offramp

## API

```ts
import {
  offramp,
  deposits,
  close,
  enableOtc,
  disableOtc,
  getOtcLink,
  PLATFORMS,
  CURRENCIES,
} from "@usdctofiat/offramp";

// Create deposit + delegate (resumable)
const result = await offramp(walletClient, {
  amount: "100",
  platform: PLATFORMS.REVOLUT,
  currency: CURRENCIES.EUR,
  identifier: "alice",
});
// { depositId: "362", txHash: "0x...", resumed: false }

// One-call OTC: create a deposit only one taker wallet can fill
const otc = await offramp(walletClient, {
  amount: "100",
  platform: PLATFORMS.REVOLUT,
  currency: CURRENCIES.EUR,
  identifier: "alice",
  otcTaker: "0xTakerAddress",
});
// { depositId, txHash, resumed, otcLink }

// Retrofit OTC onto an existing deposit
await enableOtc(walletClient, "362", "0xTakerAddress");
const link = getOtcLink("362");

// Make a deposit public again
await disableOtc(walletClient, "362");

// List deposits (read-only)
const list = await deposits("0x...");

// Close deposit
await close(walletClient, "362");
```

## PLATFORMS constant

```ts
PLATFORMS.REVOLUT.id            // "revolut"
PLATFORMS.REVOLUT.name          // "Revolut"
PLATFORMS.REVOLUT.currencies    // ["AED", "AUD", "CAD", ..., "USD", "ZAR"]
PLATFORMS.REVOLUT.identifier    // { label: "Revtag", placeholder: "revtag (no @)", help: "Revtag without @ (must be public)" }
PLATFORMS.REVOLUT.validate("@alice")  // { valid: true, normalized: "alice" }

// PayPal uses paypal.me USERNAMES now, not emails (v2 BREAKING):
PLATFORMS.PAYPAL.identifier     // { label: "PayPal.me Username", placeholder: "paypal.me/your-username", help: "Your PayPal.me username, not your email" }
PLATFORMS.PAYPAL.validate("https://paypal.me/Alice")  // { valid: true, normalized: "alice" }

// Extension-registration metadata (PayPal and Wise only):
PLATFORMS.PAYPAL.extensionRegistration
// { providerId: "paypal", requiredPrompt: "This PayPal username is not registered yet...", ctaLabel: "Install Peer Extension", ctaSubtext: "PayPal Business accounts are not supported at this time.", minExtensionVersion: "0.4.14" }
```

Keys: VENMO, CASHAPP, CHIME, REVOLUT, WISE, MERCADO_PAGO, ZELLE, PAYPAL, MONZO, N26

## CURRENCIES constant

```ts
CURRENCIES.EUR.code        // "EUR"
CURRENCIES.EUR.name        // "Euro"
CURRENCIES.EUR.symbol      // "€"
CURRENCIES.EUR.countryCode // "eu"
```

34 currencies: AED, ARS, AUD, BRL, CAD, CHF, CNY, CZK, DKK, EUR, GBP, HKD, HUF, IDR, ILS, INR, JPY, KES, MXN, MYR, NOK, NZD, PHP, PLN, RON, SAR, SEK, SGD, THB, TRY, UGX, USD, VND, ZAR

## React Hooks

```ts
import { useOfframp, usePeerExtensionRegistration } from "@usdctofiat/offramp/react";

const {
  offramp, deposits, close,
  state, step, txHash, depositId,
  lastError, isLoading, reset,
} = useOfframp({ integratorId: "your-app", referralId: "partner-123" });
// state: "idle" | "approving" | "registering" | "depositing" | "confirming" | "delegating" | "done" | "error"
// step:  granular OfframpStep (also includes "resuming" and "restricting" — `state` collapses those into "delegating")
// lastError: OfframpError | null — has .code, .step, .txHash, .depositId, .cause
// (`error` is also returned for legacy callers but is deprecated — use `lastError`.)

// PayPal + Wise extension handshake driver:
const peer = usePeerExtensionRegistration(PLATFORMS.PAYPAL);
// { phase, info, busy, error, capturedMetadata, refresh, installExtension,
//   connectExtension, startRegistrationCapture, completeRegistration }
// phase: "checking" | "needs_install" | "needs_connection" | "ready" | "unsupported"
// startRegistrationCapture() launches headless metadata capture; once
//   capturedMetadata.sarCredentialCapture.credentialBundle is set, call
//   completeRegistration(walletClient, params) to upload + retry in one shot.
// (openVerifySidebar() is a deprecated alias of startRegistrationCapture().)
```

## Types

```ts
interface OfframpParams {
  amount: string;            // USDC decimal, min 1
  platform: PlatformEntry;   // PLATFORMS.REVOLUT etc
  currency: CurrencyEntry;   // CURRENCIES.EUR etc
  identifier: string;        // platform-specific (PayPal is paypal.me USERNAME, not email)
  otcTaker?: string;         // restrict deposit to a single taker wallet
  integratorId?: string;     // ERC-8021 attribution (telemetry)
  referralId?: string;       // optional partner referral code (telemetry)
  idempotencyKey?: string;   // per-wallet replay key, replays the first successful result for 10 minutes
}

interface OfframpResult {
  depositId: string;
  txHash: string;
  resumed: boolean;  // true if existing undelegated deposit was resumed
  otcLink?: string;  // present when otcTaker was provided
}

interface EnableOtcResult {
  depositId: string;
  takerAddress: string;
  otcLink: string;
}

type OfframpStep =
  | "approving"
  | "registering"
  | "depositing"
  | "confirming"
  | "delegating"
  | "restricting"  // only when otcTaker is provided
  | "resuming"
  | "done";

interface DepositInfo {
  depositId: string;       // pass to close()
  compositeId: string;     // escrowAddress_depositId
  txHash?: string;
  status: "active" | "empty" | "closed";
  remainingUsdc: number;
  outstandingUsdc: number;
  totalTakenUsdc: number;
  fulfilledIntents: number;
  paymentMethods: string[];
  currencies: string[];
  rateSource: string;      // pricing-mode tag from the indexer (e.g. "track_market", "fixed"); "unknown" when missing
  delegated: boolean;
  escrowAddress: string;
}
```

## Errors

```ts
import { OfframpError, OFFRAMP_ERROR_CODES } from "@usdctofiat/offramp";
// error.code values:
//   VALIDATION
//   APPROVAL_FAILED
//   REGISTRATION_FAILED
//   EXTENSION_REGISTRATION_REQUIRED   // PayPal / Wise Peer extension gate
//   DEPOSIT_FAILED
//   CONFIRMATION_FAILED
//   DELEGATION_FAILED
//   USER_CANCELLED
//   UNSUPPORTED
// error.step, error.txHash, error.depositId
```

Generic recovery: call offramp() again — it detects undelegated deposits and resumes.

`EXTENSION_REGISTRATION_REQUIRED` recovery: walk the user through
`usePeerExtensionRegistration(platform)` (React) or `peerExtensionSdk` directly
(see Peer Extension section below), then call offramp() with the same handle.

## Peer Extension (PayPal, Wise)

PayPal and Wise makers must register their handle inside the Peer (PeerAuth)
browser extension before curator's `/v2/makers/create` accepts them. `offramp()`
throws `OfframpError` with code `EXTENSION_REGISTRATION_REQUIRED` when this
happens. The SDK re-exports the driver from `@zkp2p/sdk` so you don't need a
direct dep on it:

```ts
import {
  peerExtensionSdk,
  getPeerExtensionRegistrationAuthParams,
  completePeerExtensionRegistration,
} from "@usdctofiat/offramp";

const state = await peerExtensionSdk.getState();
// "needs_install" | "needs_connection" | "ready"

if (state === "needs_install") peerExtensionSdk.openInstallPage();
else if (state === "needs_connection") await peerExtensionSdk.requestConnection();
else {
  // Headless metadata capture (v4 — the sidepanel openSidebar() flow is gone):
  const params = getPeerExtensionRegistrationAuthParams("paypal");
  const unsubscribe = peerExtensionSdk.onMetadataMessage(async (message) => {
    if (message.platform !== params.platform) return;
    if (!message.sarCredentialCapture?.credentialBundle) return;
    await completePeerExtensionRegistration({
      platform: PLATFORMS.PAYPAL,
      identifier: "alicepay",
      capturedMetadata: message,
    });
    // then call offramp() again with the same handle
  });
  peerExtensionSdk.authenticate(params);
}
```

React wrapper:

```tsx
import { PLATFORMS, OFFRAMP_ERROR_CODES } from "@usdctofiat/offramp";
import { useOfframp, usePeerExtensionRegistration } from "@usdctofiat/offramp/react";

const { offramp, lastError } = useOfframp();
const peer = usePeerExtensionRegistration(PLATFORMS.PAYPAL);

const needsExt = lastError?.code === OFFRAMP_ERROR_CODES.EXTENSION_REGISTRATION_REQUIRED;
// peer.phase-aware CTAs:
//   peer.phase === "needs_install"    → peer.installExtension()
//   peer.phase === "needs_connection" → peer.connectExtension()
//   peer.phase === "ready"            → peer.startRegistrationCapture()
// When peer.capturedMetadata.sarCredentialCapture.credentialBundle is set:
//   peer.completeRegistration(walletClient, params)  (uploads + retries deposit)
// Or after the user confirms: call offramp() again with the same identifier.
```

Only PayPal and Wise require this today. The `extensionRegistration` field on
the platform entry is `undefined` for every other platform.

See `usdctofiat/paypal-react-example.tsx` and `usdctofiat/paypal-deposit.ts`.

## Peer Extension v4 direct-driver changes

If you use the re-exported `peerExtensionSdk` directly, v4 follows
`@zkp2p/sdk@0.5.0`. The upstream sidepanel onramp contract was removed:
`peerExtensionSdk.onramp()`, `getOnrampTransaction()`, and `openSidebar()` are
gone, along with the `PeerExtensionOnrampParams` /
`PeerOnrampPreparedTransaction*` types. Capture now runs through the headless
metadata bridge — register `onMetadataMessage(callback)`, then call
`authenticate({ actionType, captureMode, platform, providerConfig })`. Build the
buyer-TEE proof from the captured message, prepare fulfill calldata via
`fulfillIntent.prepare`, and broadcast it yourself. There is no pull-recovery
path — re-run `authenticate` for the active intent if a callback is missed.
`PeerSarCredentialBundle` is now an alias of `@zkp2p/sdk`'s
`SellerCredentialBundle`.

## How It Works

offramp() is resumable. Before creating a new deposit, it checks for an existing undelegated deposit. If found, skips to delegation.

Full flow (3 wallet signatures — 4 when otcTaker is supplied):
1. Approve USDC allowance (wallet tx)
2. Register payee details (`POST /v2/makers/create` — flat `{ offchainId, telegramUsername? }` payload)
3. Create deposit on-chain (wallet tx)
4. Confirm deposit ID (automatic, no signature)
5. Delegate to vault (wallet tx)
6. Restrict to OTC taker (wallet tx, only when `otcTaker` is set)

All deposits are delegated, market-tracking, auto-closing, on Base (8453).

## OTC private orders

Pass `otcTaker` to `offramp()` to whitelist a single taker wallet at creation time, or use `enableOtc` / `disableOtc` to toggle restriction on an existing deposit. Hand the returned `otcLink` (or `getOtcLink(depositId)`) to the taker — it deep-links into usdctofiat.xyz to the restricted deposit.

## Webhooks

Register outbound HMAC-SHA256 signed webhooks at https://usdctofiat.xyz/developers. Auth uses the same Peerlytics API key (same `paid-api-keys` collection, same `api-credits` pool). Registration is a Pro-plan feature — free-tier keys get `402 webhooks_require_pro`.

Events:
- Live (delivered today): `deposit.created`, `deposit.filled`, `deposit.partially_filled`, `deposit.closed`, `otc.taken`.
- Reserved (registerable, not yet emitted): `otc.enabled`, `otc.disabled`. The dispatcher does not currently fan these out — register them safely now and they'll start delivering when the dispatcher catches up.

Delivery headers:
  X-Usdctofiat-Signature   t=<unix>,v1=<hex>
  X-Usdctofiat-Event       one of the events above
  X-Usdctofiat-Delivery-Id uuid

Verification: recompute HMAC-SHA256 over `${timestamp}.${rawBody}` with your stored secret, `timingSafeEqual` against the `v1=` hex. Reject timestamps older than 5 minutes to defend against replay. Reference receiver: `usdctofiat/webhook-receiver.ts` (~150 LOC, `node:crypto` only).

## v2 migration

v1.x is broken against the live curator — the old `POST /v1/makers/create` endpoint and legacy payload blobs (`paypalEmail`, `venmoUsername`, `wisetag`, …) are no longer accepted. If you were on v1, upgrade and:

1. Re-prompt PayPal users for their paypal.me USERNAME (not email).
2. Handle `OFFRAMP_ERROR_CODES.EXTENSION_REGISTRATION_REQUIRED` on PayPal and Wise — walk the user through `usePeerExtensionRegistration(...)` and retry.
3. If you hand-rolled `POST /v1/makers/create`, switch to `POST /v2/makers/create` with `{ processorName, offchainId, telegramUsername? }`.

## v4 migration

The core `offramp()` / `useOfframp()` flow remains stable — just bump the
version. Only direct `peerExtensionSdk` drivers are affected: `onramp()`,
`getOnrampTransaction()`, and `openSidebar()` are removed. Migrate to the
`@zkp2p/sdk@0.5.0` `authenticate()` + `onMetadataMessage()` bridge described
above. For seller registration use `getPeerExtensionRegistrationAuthParams` /
`completePeerExtensionRegistration` (or the `usePeerExtensionRegistration` hook).

## Links

- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@usdctofiat/offramp
- usdctofiat.xyz: https://usdctofiat.xyz
- usdctofiat.xyz/developers: canonical SDK docs (includes Peer extension flow)
- @usdctofiat: https://x.com/usdctofiat
